programme.title: Premium Spectacular: The Frontline of Hate: A True Account of Global Extreme Nationalism
programme.desc: Far-right forces are rising significantly worldwide. From al-Qaeda (AQ) in the Middle East to extremists within the German Special Forces Command (KSK), and neo-Nazi militants colluding with each other on the Ukrainian battlefield, right-wing extremism is infiltrating military and police systems, using the professional skills of veterans and active-duty soldiers to plan and carry out terrorist attacks and attempt to overthrow governments…

programme.title: E392
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

programme.title: E231
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.

programme.desc: The Marsupilamis are great at making music, and when a music producer hears it Jade says it was her. // Lalou's cat adoption day doesn't go smoothly, when Punch is adopted by mistake.

programme.title: E9 - 00後求職小伙被職場整頓
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 聚焦產業振興、生態保護、鄉村振興等，深入解讀百千萬工程如何引領廣東逐步縮小城鄉差距，促進區域均衡發展，並通過鮮活的人物故事，細膩呈現三年來南粵大地山海之間發生的精彩蝶變。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 寧檬一直有一個成為投資總監的職業夢想，可畢業後做的工作卻與夢想相距甚遠。她的上司陸既明是一個業務能力極強的投資總裁，他不認為寧檬也能成為合格的投資人。某一天寧檬終於下定決心離開陸既明，向他也向自己證明她可以做到。寧檬重新求職，經過種種阻礙，機緣下最終進入了鷹石投資，開始了她的晉升之路。過程中陸既明也在關注着寧檬，起初他不認可，但在重要關頭還是會對寧檬進行提點，幫助她度過難關。陸既明長遠的投資理念使寧檬獲益匪淺，寧檬也改變了陸既明的處世態度。兩人互相影響，攜手並進，經歷了無數的波折和風浪之後，寧檬蜕變成為了獨當一面的金牌投資人，陸既明也歷練得更加成熟有擔當。他們認定彼此就是自己最正確的那個人。

The show explores current social, political, and cultural topics, offering viewers insightful perspectives and thoughtful analysis on issues shaping the world today.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.desc: Culture news from the world's art, food, and fashion capital, Paris, bringing you the latest trends, exhibitions, culinary innovations, and style movements that continue to shape global taste and creativity.

E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E21 - Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: E23 - Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: E25 - Dr. Catastrophe
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: E6 - I Can Be Anything
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and follow their dreams.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E43 - Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: E44 - Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: E20 - Out Of Site
programme.desc: Brenda learns that it is important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: E44 - Whistler Mountain, Canada
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are on Whistler Mountain in Canada doing some skiing and checking out the amazing cable car which runs high up between the mountains.

programme.title: E19 - Joist Hoist
programme.desc: There's a girder out of place on Swoppiton Bridge, and unless Nori can fix it, that bridge is coming down! Luckily, Mojo's got the tops, and Bo's got the skills to help get it done.

programme.title: E5 - Operation Jewel
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Tomato's precious jewel. Supertato ventures to get it back by secretly lifting the jewel from Evil Pea's crown and defeating a crowd of rampaging Mini Peas.

programme.title: E20 - The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: E21 - The Collecting Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E23 - Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: E25 - Dr. Catastrophe
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E43 - Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: E44 - Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: E20 - Out Of Site
programme.desc: Brenda learns that it is important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: E19 - Joist Hoist
programme.desc: There's a girder out of place on Swoppiton Bridge, and unless Nori can fix it, that bridge is coming down! Luckily, Mojo's got the tops, and Bo's got the skills to help get it done.

programme.title: E20 - The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: E21 - The Collecting Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: E23 - Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: E25 - Dr. Catastrophe
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: E41 - Mums And Dads
programme.desc: When Indy and Rusty play Mums and Dads, they can't agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby.

programme.title: E42 - Hide And Seek
programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a fishing-boat captain to take her across Lake Superior to a new life in Canada. When an accident leaves her washed up on shore, she's taken in by a lighthouse keeper.

programme.title: E23 - Deep South Bouillabaisse
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines French cuisine with deep Southern cooking in her take on bouillabaisse. She starts by making a homemade broth with fish remnants, vegetable scraps, spices and more in a pot.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a fishing-boat captain to take her across Lake Superior to a new life in Canada. When an accident leaves her washed up on shore, she's taken in by a lighthouse keeper.

programme.title: E89 - Dallas: Carriage
programme.desc: Looks can be deceiving. This Derek special is set in a posh neighborhood on a treelined street and from the outside it doesn't look like your typical Zombie.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: After 11 hours by train, the Earth-Cleaning Bros learn they have 16 more hours to go - off-road! Bouncing and jolting toward a remote nomadic village, they eat, shop and finally reach their stay.

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: It's the final day of Sweet Week and the cooks must battle it out in today's elimination to earn their place in the halfway point of this competition.

The Adventurers
programme.desc: 20 years ago, in the region of Golden Triangle, Wah(aged about 9) and his parents, his god father (Keung) with his daughter (aged about 5) planned to smuggle some valuable items and information into Thailand. Wah's father, Keung and Leung were the closest of friends, just like blood brothers, all 3 of them were C.I.A. agents. Keung left for Thailand before the others to plan the operation. Leung ganged up with some bandits and forced Wah's father to surrender the confidential information. Wah, hidden in the dark, saw his parents being killed. 20 years later, Wah became an officer in the Thai Air Force. He couldn't take his mind off the revenge. Leung became a successful business man. He was in Thailand to launch a major business project. Ignoring Keung's advise, Wah and Roy slipped into Leung's hotel to try to assassinate him...

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: 20 years ago, in the region of Golden Triangle, Wah(aged about 9) and his parents, his god father (Keung) with his daughter (aged about 5) planned to smuggle some valuable items and information into Thailand. Wah's father, Keung and Leung were the closest of friends, just like blood brothers, all 3 of them were C.I.A. agents. Keung left for Thailand before the others to plan the operation. Leung ganged up with some bandits and forced Wah's father to surrender the confidential information. Wah, hidden in the dark, saw his parents being killed. 20 years later, Wah became an officer in the Thai Air Force. He couldn't take his mind off the revenge. Leung became a successful business man. He was in Thailand to launch a major business project. Ignoring Keung's advise, Wah and Roy slipped into Leung's hotel to try to assassinate him...

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: The story is set in the Ming dynasty. 'Holy Sword' requests a fight with secret agent 009's friend 'God of Sword' to decide the world's best swordsman. During the contest on the roof of the Forbidden City, 009 realises that 'Holy Sword' has sent a double to fight in his place, while he plans to assassinate the emperor. 'Holy Sword' finds himself surrounded by thousands of palace guards but is rescued by 'God of Sword', who wants to complete their championship...

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E8 - Rheas-Cerrado
programme.desc: Every year in the dry season, as the floodwaters disappear, the grasslands of the Pantanal are home to many species: giant anteaters, maned wolves and the greater rheas- the largest bird in South America.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E11 - South Africa
programme.desc: Wildebeest battle for herd hierarchy, meerkats live the thug life, floppy fish fight it out on land and locusts give up their vegetarian ways in a frenzy of cannibalism. It all happens on the wild and wide-open landscape of South Africa.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E3 - Rocco, Harold and Cindy
programme.desc: Follow Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of Harold Custard the rockhopper penguin, and feel the love as Barista cares for Cindy the baboon in her golden years. Later, say an emotional goodbye as Rocco the wombat returns to the wild.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E5 - Boreal
programme.desc: Travel to the Arctic for a peek at the brutal challenges of life in the boreal forest, then admire some stellar animal adaptations. Witness a secret reindeer superpower, navigate a rodent labyrinth of snow, and learn why moose are gourmets at heart.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles

programme.title: E5 - Boreal
programme.desc: Travel to the Arctic for a peek at the brutal challenges of life in the boreal forest, then admire some stellar animal adaptations. Witness a secret reindeer superpower, navigate a rodent labyrinth of snow, and learn why moose are gourmets at heart.

programme.title: E3 - Rocco, Harold and Cindy
programme.desc: Follow Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of Harold Custard the rockhopper penguin, and feel the love as Barista cares for Cindy the baboon in her golden years. Later, say an emotional goodbye as Rocco the wombat returns to the wild.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E8 - Rheas-Cerrado
programme.desc: Every year in the dry season, as the floodwaters disappear, the grasslands of the Pantanal are home to many species: giant anteaters, maned wolves and the greater rheas- the largest bird in South America.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: E11 - South Africa
programme.desc: Wildebeest battle for herd hierarchy, meerkats live the thug life, floppy fish fight it out on land and locusts give up their vegetarian ways in a frenzy of cannibalism. It all happens on the wild and wide-open landscape of South Africa.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: Fostering Resilience: Bulgarians' Parenting Style
programme.desc: What can Bulgarian parents teach us about how to raise kids? What's a day like in a chocolate taster's life? And: What‘s the secret behind Swabian dumplings?

programme.title: Unstoppable
programme.desc: Disability should not be a barrier, but rather an opportunity for our societies to innovate so that we can best use much needed skills and talents. How did these women become involved? How were they empowered? What needs to be done to promote the inclusion of women with disabilities?

programme.title: Abolish Prisons? - What Works Better Than Incarceration
programme.desc: Approximately 58,000 people are currently incarcerated in German prisons. Over half of them reoffend after their release. These statistics raise doubts about the prison system. Is something fundamentally wrong with German prisons?

programme.title: Makoko Demolitions: Who Is Lagos Really Being Built For?
programme.desc: 'People were sleeping in canoes after the demolitions.” This week on The 77 Percent, we travel to Makoko for a street debate on housing, inequality and the future of Lagos.

programme.title: Beating India's Heat - With An Ancient Cooling Hack
programme.desc: In Delhi's brutal heatwaves, a low-cost, 3000-year-old cooling method is saving lives. Plus: The women in Kerala who mapped tidal flooding to force change.

programme.desc: VW is badging its new EVs with the names of old favorites like the Polo, while partnering with XPeng and Rivian on tech. Will its rebrand work? And: Therapy on wheels - rollerblading in Abuja and drifting in Kyiv.

E701 - Sparkle's Big Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher sends Blaze away with one of his latest cheats, Blaze's little sister Sparkle comes to save the day and bring her brother back in time so they can race together to win the Teamwork Trophy!

programme.title: E311 - Pups Save The Polar Bears / A Pup In Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups must fly to the Arctic in the Air Patroller to rescue the lost cubs. // When little lambs keep running away from Farmer Al's pasture, it's up to the Paw Patrol to find the missing sheep.

programme.title: E106 - The Playgroup
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to daycare. It's George's first day at daycare, and he shows the class his interest in dinosaurs.

programme.title: E228 - Zoe Zebra, The Postman's Daughter
programme.desc: Mr. Zebra the Postman gets help from his daughter Zoe. Zoe has a very special letter for Peppa and George; an invitation to her birthday party. The party is fun, especially as it turns out that Zoe has invited all of Peppa and George's friends.

programme.title: E236 - School Bus Trip
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her school friends on a school bus trip to the mountains. From the top of the mountains there is a fantastic view and Peppa and her friends have fun hearing echoes. After a great day out, the bus takes the children home

programme.title: E611 - Firefighters To The Rescue!
programme.desc: When three fire emergencies break out across Axle City, it's up to Blaze to put 'em out - and to do it, he'll transform into the most epic fire rescue vehicles we've ever seen!

programme.title: E311 - Pups Save The Polar Bears / A Pup In Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups must fly to the Arctic in the Air Patroller to rescue the lost cubs. // When little lambs keep running away from Farmer Al's pasture, it's up to the Paw Patrol to find the missing sheep.

programme.title: E616 - Pups Save The Spider Spies
programme.desc: The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It's up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

programme.title: E213 - Watch Out For Barbabright / If I Were A Billionaire
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: E214 - The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E309 - Sandcastle Calamity / Owl-Ert
programme.desc: Steel upsets a family of sand crabs when he makes a huge sandcastle for Stu and Safia. // Kai rushes through a voice-recognition upgrade on Janice and she ends up mistaking the hoots of a baby owl as commands from Alex, making his gadgets go crazy.

programme.title: E206 - Partly Claudia
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide.

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E201 - Granny Zanny / Croc Gets A Job
programme.desc: Crocodile tries to impress Daisy's grandmother when she comes to visit. // Mr. Crocodile realizes he doesn't have an official 'job' and goes in search of the perfect one.

programme.title: E304 - The Crew Builds A Super Mega Movie Screen / The Crew Builds An Auntie Day P
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: E1112 - Pups Save The Baddies / Pups Save The Yumi Bee
programme.desc: Humdinger, Sid, and Sweetie have joined forces to try and take over the Lookout. // Humdinger sabotages Yumi's Bee costume sending her buzzing out of control.

programme.title: E206 - The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: E207 - Don't Go Grandma / Stuck / Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia try to stop Grandma from leaving, so they can spend more time with her / When Terri & Tommy get locked in the Garden Dome, they must put their differences aside to try to escape / Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.

programme.title: E236 - School Bus Trip
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her school friends on a school bus trip to the mountains. From the top of the mountains there is a fantastic view and Peppa and her friends have fun hearing echoes. After a great day out, the bus takes the children home

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: E8 - Hyrox
programme.desc: The hottest new sport of hybrid games sweeping the world is Hyrox, so the team puts their fitness to the test in Melbourne.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E2 - Rob Brydon
programme.desc: Funny man Rob Brydon joins Bear Grylls for an adventure he won’t forget as he takes on a mission in the Mountains of Snowdonia.

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!

programme.title: E10 - East Region 3: Dj's Last Call
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In these Eastern division battles we see Josh Porter go up against Blake Broadhurst for the men while Shantal Athill takes on Courtney Roselle for the women. They will compete on obstacles such as Launch Pad, Over the Edge, Nuts and Bolts and Lunar Impact. Winners will move on to face reigning Titan’s on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: E11 - Eastern Regional Finals
programme.desc: Olympic gold-medal winning snowboarder Hannah Teter and five-time UFC champion Tyron Woodley return along with four other top competitors from the Eastern Region for one last shot at redemption. The contenders face off in a three-way battle before advancing to a classic head-to-head competition. The last competitors standing must defeat the reigning Titans on Mt. Olympus to advance to the championship round. Dwayne Johnson serves as Host while Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Fiery First Experience of Voice Acting
programme.desc: New title of the Crayon Shinchan movie series, “Crayon Shinchan the Movie: Super-Hot! The Spicy Kasukabe Dancers”, has been released. For Hong Kong's Cantonese-dubbed version, singer Cloud Wan Ho Ying and new generation idol Phoebus Ng Kai Yeung have been invited to voice over two new characters. In this episode, Cloud and Phoebus will share the anecdotes from their dubbing experience; Phoebus will demonstrate some voice over techniques, and more behind-the-scene stories are to be told.

programme.title: The Odd One Dies
programme.desc: Mo is a low-life gangster, who dreams of a better life. He sees his chance when he's promised a $88,000 fee to commit a murder. However, the day before the assassination is meant to take place, Mo bets all his money at a casino, and wins a fortune...
